---
title: "Using Generative and Agentic AI for Omics Data Analysis"
subtitle: "Workshop on July 13-14, 2026"
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<hr style="height:1pt; visibility:hidden;" />

#### Monday, July 13

| Time | Instructor | Topic & link |
|----|----|----|
| 09:00 - 09:30 am | Jelmer / all | Workshop introduction |
| 09:30 - 10:00 am | all | How the instructors have used genAI |


#### Tuesday, July 14
